final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic explaining the definitions and relationships between AI concepts.

Style/medium: hand-drawn sketch style, friendly and approachable, whiteboard marker aesthetic, flat illustration with organic linework
Subject: six interconnected concepts arranged in a visual hierarchy: AI (top level), MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, and 蒸馏 (distillation), CLI as supporting tool
Composition: centered radial or flowchart layout with clear visual pathways showing parent-child and sibling relationships, generous whitespace for readability
Color palette: soft pastels with one accent color per concept category, limited palette of 4-5 colors for clarity
Text (verbatim): "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must be readable at thumbnail size; icons must clearly represent each concept; relationship arrows must not cross confusingly
Avoid: photorealistic rendering; 3D effects; complex gradients; tiny unreadable text; cluttered overlapping elements; generic stock icon style
